hero.subtitleLine1: StartupConnect Ethiopia is a digital platform that brings together startups, investors,
hero.subtitleLine2: and mentors in one trusted environment.

challenge.title: The Challenge
challenge.paragraph1: Many Ethiopian startups struggle to move beyond the idea or prototype stage because they lack access to funding, mentorship, and visibility. Investors also face difficulty finding credible, verified startups.
challenge.paragraph2: There is no centralized digital platform that connects all stakeholders in the ecosystem, making collaboration difficult and slowing down innovation.

solution.title: Our Solution
solution.subtitle: StartupConnect Ethiopia provides a centralized platform where:

card1.title: Startup Showcase
card1.description: Startups can showcase their ideas and upload pitch materials.

card2.title: Investor Discovery
card2.description: Investors can discover verified startups with potential.

card3.title: Structured Mentorship
card3.description: Mentors can guide founders through structured programs.

card4.title: Communication
card4.description: All users can communicate through chat and meetings.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.description: To empower Ethiopian startups by providing access to funding, mentorship, and visibility through a trusted digital platform.

vision.title: Our Vision
vision.description: To become the leading digital hub for startup innovation and investment across Ethiopia.

card1.title: Trust and Verification
card1.description: Verified profiles for startups, investors, and mentors.

card3.title: Local Focus
card3.description: Built specifically for Ethiopia's startup ecosystem.

card4.title: Accessibility
card4.description: Available via web and mobile, with local payment integration.

cta.title: Join the platform and be part of Ethiopia's innovation future.

ethioVenture.text: We've reviewed your latest pitch deck. Can we discu...

sheba.text: The meeting invitation has been sent for Thursday.

zemen.text: Waiting for your response regarding the cap table...

history.message1: Greetings Abebe. We've gone through the operational plan for the Q3 expansion in the Bahir Dar region. The logistics part looks solid, but we have some concerns regarding the local vendor partnerships.
history.message2: Thank you for the quick feedback, Dawit. We are aware of the vendor fragmentation there. We are currently finalizing a MOU with two major logistics hubs to centralize our sourcing. Would you like to see the preliminary MOU drafts?
history.message3: Yes, that would be very helpful. Also, please attach the latest user growth chart for the mobile app version. We noticed a spike last week.
history.message4: Absolutely. Here is the growth analytics report from last week. The spike was due to our integrated marketing campaign with EthioTelecom.

main.title: Provide Investor Feedback
main.subtitle: Your feedback helps maintain a high-quality investor network and guides other founders in our ecosystem.

form.commentsPlaceholder: Share your experience working with this investor...

abebe.text: Great strategic advice and very founder-friendly terms. Added significant value beyond capital...

globalTech.text: Lengthy due diligence process, but provided excellent post-investment support and connections...

africaVentures.text: Very quick to make a decision and aligned with our long-term vision. Highly recommend for seed stage...

insight.message: A strong investor-founder relationship is built on transparency. Your feedback empowers the entire founder community to make informed decisions.
insight.label: FOUNDER NETWORK INSIGHT

chat.title: Live Chat with Dr. Sara
chat.message1: Hello Abel! I've just finished reviewing your latest financial projections. Your revenue model for Q3 looks much more realistic now. Have you considered the new tax regulations for tech exports?
chat.message2: Thank you, Dr. Sara! I was actually looking into those yesterday. I've updated the cash flow statement to reflect the potential impact. I'll share the new file here.
chat.message3: Great. Send it over. Also, our session on Monday will focus heavily on your investor pitch. We need to sharpen the "Why Ethiopia, Why Now?" section of your presentation.

header.title: AI Recommendations
header.subtitle: Best matches based on your startup profile, project stage, funding needs, and industry.

greenHorizon.reason: Matches your focus on sustainable agriculture in East Africa and your current seed-stage funding requirements.

ethioVentures.reason: Strong alignment with your scaling strategy for rural Ethiopian markets and previous successful Agri-fintech exits.

blueNile.reason: Highly active in the pre-seed space for tech-enabled traditional industries in the Horn of Africa.

selamawit.title: 15+ Years Industry Experience
selamawit.reason: Expert in scaling AgriTech startups in Ethiopia with specific knowledge of local regulatory compliance and distribution networks.

elias.title: Former Tech Lead @ Safaricom
elias.reason: Highly recommended for your project's technical architecture, specifically for building low-connectivity mobile solutions.

martha.title: Marketing & Brand Strategist
martha.reason: Can assist with your B2B go-to-market strategy and brand positioning for corporate agricultural partners.
